title: CDSA-MRO: Maintenance Safety Pillar of the CDSA Federated Reinforcement Learning Paradigm — Multi-modal Engine + Cyber + Maintenance Fusion
description: CDSA-MRO is the reference implementation of the maintenance safety pillar of the Complementary Diagnostic Safety Approach (CDSA), a third-generation aviation safety paradigm formalised as a Federated Reinforcement Learning (FRL) framework (Scenario C decision, 21 May 2026). The v2.1.0 release (12 June 2026) replaces the v2.0.0 scaffold stubs with full NumPy reference implementations (federated, multimodal, rl_agents, rl_environment, xai; all unit-tested) and adds seeded, reproducible CPU-scale federated training runs (random / centralised PPO / FedAvg / FedProx / FedProx+DP) with result JSONs under experiments/results/. An interactive results panel is published at https://cdsa.app/mro. Framework-scale training with real data is planned under TÜBİTAK funding (Phase B). The v1.0.0 release modules and reference data remain unchanged.

creators.name: Cantekin, Mete
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Engineering, Istanbul Beykent University

notes: v2.1.0 (12 June 2026): Faz A implementation + A6 CPU-scale federated runs. v1.0.0 and v2.0.0-scaffold tags remain valid; see CHANGELOG.md for details.
